# shadcn-svelte-extras Documentation for LLMs

> shadcn-svelte-extras is a collection of components that follow the same styling as shadcn-svelte.
 
## Components
- [AvatarGroup Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/avatar-group/llms.txt)
- [Button Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/button/llms.txt)
- [Chat Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/chat/llms.txt)
- [Code Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/code/llms.txt)
- [CopyButton Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/copy-button/llms.txt)
- [FieldSet Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/field-set/llms.txt)
- [FileDropZone Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/file-drop-zone/llms.txt)
- [ImageCropper Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/image-cropper/llms.txt)
- [Ipv4addressInput Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/ipv4address-input/llms.txt)
- [LanguageSwitcher Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/language-switcher/llms.txt)
- [LightSwitch Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/light-switch/llms.txt)
- [Link Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/link/llms.txt)
- [Meter Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/meter/llms.txt)
- [Modal Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/modal/llms.txt)
- [NlpDateInput Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/nlp-date-input/llms.txt)
- [PhoneInput Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/phone-input/llms.txt)
- [PmCommand Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/pm-command/llms.txt)
- [NumberField Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/number-field/llms.txt)
- [Snippet Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/snippet/llms.txt)
- [StarRating Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/star-rating/llms.txt)
- [Stepper Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/stepper/llms.txt)
- [TagsInput Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/tags-input/llms.txt)
- [Terminal Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/terminal/llms.txt)
- [ThemeSelector Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/theme-selector/llms.txt)
- [Toc Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/toc/llms.txt)
- [TreeView Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/tree-view/llms.txt)
- [UnderlineTabs Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/underline-tabs/llms.txt)
- [Window Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/window/llms.txt)
- [EmojiPicker Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/emoji-picker/llms.txt)
- [Password Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/password/llms.txt)
- [Rename Documentation](https://shadcn-svelte-extras.com/components/rename/llms.txt)
